revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Itsumono Shrine (Q135041258)
| native_name = 出雲神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Itsumono Shrine (Q135041258)
| coordinates = {{coord|34.175719|131.635295}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Itsumono Shrine'''|出雲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Ni-no-Miya|lt=Ni-no-Miya|qid=Q134917533|1=Ni-no-Miya}}
** P1001: {{ill|Suō Province|lt=Suō Province|cs|Provincie Suó|de|Provinz Suō|en|Suō Province|es|Provincia de Suō|fa|ولایت سوئو|fr|Province de Suō|gl|Provincia de Suō|id|Provinsi Suō|it|Suō (provincia)|ja|周防国|ko|스오국|lt|Suo žemė|nl|Suo (provincie)|pt|Província de Suō|ru|Суо (провинция)|simple|Suō Province|sk|Suó (provincia)|sr|Провинција Суо|tr|Suō (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Суо|uz|Suo viloyati|wuu|周防国|zh_min_nan|Suô-kok|zh|周防國|qid=Q1053037|1=Suō Province}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}

* {{ill|Q11416958|ltq=Q11416958|qid=Q11416958|1=List of Shikinaisha in Suo Province}}
** Series ordinal: 4
** P155: {{ill|Q11572731|ltq=Q11572731|qid=Q11572731|1=Tamanooya Shrine (Q11572731)}}
** P156: {{ill|Misakano Shrine|lt=Misakano Shrine|qid=Q135041263|1=Misakano Shrine (Q135041263)}}
